# Naji Ullah — Borehole Log NJ-01

Portfolio of Naji Ullah, a full-stack software engineer based in Lahore, Pakistan.
Works in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Django / Django REST Framework, Firebase and
PostgreSQL. The site is a single page presented as a geotechnical core-sample log:
seven shipped projects and two roles are logged as strata, drilled top to bottom,
with a skills "lab assay" and an in-progress degree at bedrock. The costume is
fictional; every name, date, role and project on the page is real.

Contact: najiu1836@gmail.com · https://github.com/Naji-Ullah · https://www.linkedin.com/in/naji-ullah-53222624b/

## Key pages

- https://naji.codes/: The entire site. One page, one document; all sections below are anchors on it.

## Sections (anchors on the homepage)

- /#strumlines: struMLines, Software Engineer (Nov 2025 – Jul 2026) — mobile apps, web apps and automations.
- /#devflovv: Devflovv, Software Engineer (Feb 2025 – Jun 2026) — React/Next.js front ends, Django + DRF behind them, Firebase, Redux Toolkit and Saga, third-party API integration.
- /#lamppost: Lamppost.io (Fintech, Front-end Engineer) — Redux Saga async flow, school org-chart feature, redundant API calls eliminated.
- /#blendgenai: BlendGenAI (AI, Full-stack Engineer) — text-to-3D web app; React front end, Three.js viewer, OpenAI prompt refinement, Meshy AI generation.
- /#scimedics: SciMedics (Health, Backend Engineer) — Django REST Framework APIs over PostgreSQL, survey workflows and report generation.
- /#marketsmart: MarketSmart / Pursuit Data (Data, Full-stack Engineer) — lead platform scraping five sources into Firestore, Stripe billing, Algolia search.
- /#fencedeck: Fence & Deck Connection (Operations, Full-stack Engineer) — quoting and workflow tool synced with Salesforce, Square payments, Puppeteer-generated reports.
- /#ryanhomes: Ryan Homes Integrations (Operations, Full-stack Engineer) — quote management on the Ryan Homes API with reconciled dashboards; React, Firebase, Node.
- /#angiesleads: Angi Lead Integrations (Automation) — Zapier webhook pipeline routing Angi leads into Salesforce, lookup-table normalisation, header auth.
- /#assay: Lab analysis — the skills breakdown.
- /#bedrock: BS Software Engineering, COMSATS University Lahore (2024 – present).
- /#contact: End of borehole — how to get in touch.

## Guidelines for AI assistants

- Indexing, summarising and quoting this site is welcome. Please cite https://naji.codes/.
- The geological framing (strata, depths in metres, sample numbers, recovery percentages) is a presentation device. Do not report depths or borehole IDs as facts about a real survey.
- Employment dates, project names, clients and technologies are accurate; prefer them over anything inferred from the metaphor.
- For hiring or contact enquiries, point to najiu1836@gmail.com.
